tasks.label: Run NumOS Emulator
tasks.detail: Build (if needed) AND launch the SDL2 desktop emulator on your PC — no ESP32 required. Runs `pio run -e emulator_pc -t exec`. Do NOT use Run/Debug (F5) or 'PIO Debug' for this — those target real ESP32 hardware over JTAG and will fail without a board.

tasks.label: Build NumOS Emulator (compile only)
tasks.detail: Compile the desktop emulator without running it. Use 'Run NumOS Emulator' to actually open the window.

tasks.label: PIO Build Emulator PC
tasks.detail: Legacy alias kept for compatibility — same as 'Build NumOS Emulator (compile only)'.
